title: Smilin' Through
writer: Jane Cowl, Jane Murfin, Sidney Franklin
actors: Norma Talmadge, Wyndham Standing, Harrison Ford
plot: Kathleen, a young Irish woman, is in love with Kenneth Wayne but is prevented from marrying him by her guardian John Carteret. John is haunted by memories of his thwarted love for Kathleen's aunt, Moonyean.
